layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — patience beats impulse right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins bleeding heavily over the past week. Bitcoin dominance is high at 56.3%, meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin for safety. While there are some oversold coins that could bounce, none of the setups are clean enough to justify risking capital. The best candidate is Ether.fi, which has bullish chart structure and momentum, but the broader market headwinds are too strong to pull the trigger today.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait for clearer signals. The market is in fear mode and most altcoins are in downtrends. Better entry opportunities will come when fear peaks and reversal signals confirm.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a compelling risk/reward for a new swing entry. ETHFI has the best chart structure (bullish bias +0.60, Bullish Marubozu, above 2 MAs) but the risk/reward to nearest levels is only 0.11x — abysmal for swing trading. TRUMP and ZRO have deeply oversold RSIs (29 and 31) but are in confirmed downtrends with bearish chart bias scores of -0.70 each, making them knife-catch trades. BONK is the worst setup with a -1.40 chart bias and Bearish Marubozu candle. High BTC dominance at 56.3% is actively crushing altcoin performance. The Fear & Greed index at 26 is improving from last week's 24 average, but hasn't reached the extreme fear levels (sub-15) that historically produce the best bounce trades. CoinTelegraph reports Bitcoin may be in late bear market stages, which if true means we should be patient for capitulation before deploying capital.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% continues to drain capital from altcoins — any alt position faces structural headwinds
Fear & Greed at 26 is fearful but not extreme — could drop further before a meaningful reversal
Multiple news items suggest bear market conditions and macro uncertainty (crypto IPO stalls, BTC treasury selling)
watch_list: Fear & Greed index dropping below 15 (extreme fear) which historically marks swing trade entry zones
ETHFI pulling back to $0.38-0.39 support zone with RSI dropping to 40 or below for a proper entry
BTC dominance starting to roll over below 55% which would signal rotation back into alts
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear phase with BTC dominance elevated at 56.3%, punishing altcoins. BTC itself is range-bound near $63.8K with analysts debating whether this is a late-stage bear market or early recovery.
context_banner: Market fear is elevated but not extreme — the best swing trade setups emerge from deeper capitulation, not from catching falling knives in a high-dominance environment.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) with improving trend from 24 avg — fearful but not at extreme levels that produce the highest-probability bounce trades.
TRUMP RSI at 29 and ZRO RSI at 31 are oversold, but both have bearish chart structures (-0.70 bias) making them low-conviction bounce plays.
Bitcoin described as nearing 'late stages of bear market' by Real Vision's Jamie Coutts — suggests patience for capitulation rather than early entries.
Crypto IPO market stalling and BTC treasury companies selling holdings signals institutional caution and potential further downside.
ETHFI is the only candidate with a bullish chart bias (+0.60) and Bullish Marubozu candle, but its 0.11x risk/reward to nearest resistance makes it a poor entry at current levels.
